div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
User adds:
1) 'V4' to HonchoApiVersion enum
2) HonchoClientV4 class
3) V4 provider classes
(@Component auto-discovered)
NO changes to: Factory, V3 client, V3 providers, Registry
